markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Gitpod and GrowthX to align on content strategy and goals for their new engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gitpod aims to be synonymous with engineering productivity, targeting regulated industries with 1000+ employees](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Main challenge is solution/brand awareness; once in funnel, 90% close rate](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on developer productivity across funnel stages (awareness, middle, bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop content machine, starting slow and ramping up to consistent weekly production by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

## Topics

### Gitpod's Target Audience and ICP

  - [Primary: Platform engineering leaders/engineers in regulated industries, 1000+ employees](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Secondary: CTOs, developers (end-users)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Key pain point: Developer productivity mandate with strict security concerns](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Use cases: VDI replacement, improving productivity for human and AI developers](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [Goal: Make Gitpod synonymous with engineering productivity](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Process: Ideation by Talia/Lou, drafting, review, publish via Gitpod (bottleneck)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Focus on creating content across funnel stages (awareness, middle, bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Aim to provide BDRs with content for each stage](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitor: Coder (deployment model key differentiator)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=2714.0)
  - [Other players: Daytona, cloud provider offerings (Google Cloud Workstations, Amazon Code Catalyst)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)
  - [Mindshare competitors: GitDX, IDEs (not direct competitors but overlap in developer productivity space)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3039.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Approach

  - [Start with calibration articles, ramp up to \~5 articles/week, aiming for consistent production by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3361.0)
  - [GrowthX to handle content creation; Gitpod team to review/provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3338.0)
  - [Focus on broader developer productivity space, not just existing Gitpod messaging](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3433.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Gitpod to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3400.0)
      - [Access to Google Search Console, Analytics (team@GrosXlabs)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3218.0)
      - [Brand/copy guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3165.0)
      - [Existing topic lists and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3114.0)
      - [Helpful reading materials on competition and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3107.0)
  - [GrowthX to:](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)
      - [Develop initial set of focus topics in Airtable (Content OS)](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)
      - [Create calibration articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3414.0)
      - [Schedule ongoing syncs](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)
      - [Share artifacts/research with Gitpod team](https://fathom.video/share/7ox4WxXnjnN5pwx1V68t_yxwyA6QY2VT?tab=summary&timestamp=3414.0)
